race.comment: TRANSACTIONS (1) was ridden quietly then quickened in great style to score first-up over 1000m at Corowa four weeks ago. That was his first run since transferring to the Rob Potter stable, and it was easily his best fresh performance to date. Can go right on with the job. THE CONTRACTOR (5) led and tried hard but found a couple stronger at the end of 1375m at Corowa last time out. Draws the fence and returns to his preferred trip. Ideally placed to have a major impact on the outcome. GIRRAWHEEN (3) drove hard late but just missed when resuming over 1100m at Scone recently. Usually holds the form second-up so from a good gate she makes plenty of appeal. DENMAN FORCE (4) had to pull out all stops to get the cash over 1000m at Orange at his latest appearance. Lightly raced and keeps improving. Unknown at 1200m which is the only knock. WEST HEAD (2) is an each-way hope first-up from a favourable draw.
